backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing product and user profile management with role-based access control, including admin-only product CRUD operations and public product queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including product browsing, Pinterest integration, admin interface, category filtering, and visual design with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the fashion e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, borders, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Fashion Products Website with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router configuration, defining routes for product browsing, detail, and admin pages, plus profile setup modal logic.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied page component displaying a shield icon and message for users without admin privileges, with a button to return to products.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering pill-shaped buttons for 'All' and each category, with active state styling based on selected category.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header containing branding, navigation, authentication controls, admin link for authorized users, and footer with Caffeine attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image with hover zoom effect, name, price, category badge, and Pinterest pin indicator icon when available.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: React form component using react-hook-form for creating and editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID. Includes validation and submit/cancel handlers.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component that prompts new users to enter their name on first visit. Uses a non-dismissible dialog and saves the profile via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication. Initializes access control with admin token from URL params and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages login state, identity persistence, and provides login/logout functions with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including user profile management, product CRUD operations, and admin role checking. Each mutation includes toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a fashion e-commerce theme using warm neutral colors, Playfair Display for headings, and Inter for body text. Includes light and dark mode color schemes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with a table view showing all products and actions to add, edit, or delete. Includes access control check, product form dialog, and delete confirmation alert.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page that displays a hero banner and a filterable grid of fashion products with category filtering, loading skeletons, and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page showing full product information including image, name, price, description, category badge, and a Pinterest link button when available.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system with OKLCH color variables, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (product browsing, Pinterest integration, admin interface, category filtering) and pending feature requests for a fashion e-commerce website.
